sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59839" key="kreopwle/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρεο-πωλέω</orth>, <sense id="n59839.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deal in butcher's meat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.33</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
